title: Tamil Nadu govt formation news LIVE: DMK says 'don't think' alliance with ‘major enemy’ AIADMK possible
description: Tamil Nadu government formation news LIVE: While Vijay's Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) won 100+ seats in the elections, it fell short of around 10 to cross the majority mark. Even with Congress's support, the party can reach only 113, still short of the 118 mandate needed to form the government.
